Bennet M. Cohen, Esq, 415-864-3246 for Moving party

Law Offices of Bennett M. Cohen, PC and Bennett M. Cohen Esq.'s Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Lujia Zhu.

Granted. Order is signed.
